Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class PriceRuleCondition

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.PriceRuleCondition
public class PriceRuleCondition extends Object

Java class for PriceRuleCondition complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="PriceRuleCondition">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="accumulateResultCondInput" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="accumulateResultCondInputType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}AccumulateResultCondInputType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="accumulateResultOperator" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}AccumulateResultOperator" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="aggregatedConditionVariable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="aggregationType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConditionAggregationFunction" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conditionVariable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="matchType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}TargetEntityMatchType"/>
         <element name="priceRuleConditionFilters" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}PriceRuleConditionFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scope" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConditionType"/>
         <element name="sequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="targetObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getPriceRuleConditionFilters

      public List<PriceRuleConditionFilter> getPriceRuleConditionFilters()
      Gets the value of the priceRuleConditionFilters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the priceRuleConditionFilters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getPriceRuleConditionFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list PriceRuleConditionFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the priceRuleConditionFilters property.
